{
  "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py",
  "newString": "    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()",
  "oldString": "    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()",
  "originalFile": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2022-2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\nfrom enum import IntFlag, auto\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom strenum import StrEnum\n\nfrom .._utils import BaseEnumMeta\n\n\nclass QuantAlgo(StrEnum, metaclass=BaseEnumMeta):\n    W8A16 = auto()\n    W4A16 = auto()\n    W4A16_AWQ = auto()\n    W4A8_AWQ = auto()\n    W8A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W4A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    FP8 = auto()\n    FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    FP8_BLOCK_SCALES = auto()\n    INT8 = auto()\n    MIXED_PRECISION = auto()\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()\n    NO_QUANT = auto()\n\n\nQUANT_ALGO_LIST = list(set(QuantAlgo) - {QuantAlgo.INT8})\nKV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST = [QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.INT8, QuantAlgo.NVFP4]\nW8A8_SQ_PLUGIN_LIST = [\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n]\nMODELOPT_FLOW_QUANTIZATIONS = {\n    QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ, QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL,\n    QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ\n}\n\n\nclass QuantMode(IntFlag):\n    # [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH cpp/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h\n\n    # The weights are quantized to 4 bits.\n    INT4_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The weights are quantized to 8 bits.\n    INT8_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The activations are quantized.\n    ACTIVATIONS = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per channel. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=True,\n                                          use_w4a8_qserve=True)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False, per_group=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=False,\n                                          per_token=False,\n                                          per_channel=False,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=use_int4_weights)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_quant_algo(\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n        kv_cache_quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n    ) -> \"QuantMode\":\n        assert quant_algo is None or quant_algo in QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        assert kv_cache_quant_algo is None or kv_cache_quant_algo in KV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_qdq=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_rowwise=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_block_scales=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4_AWQ:\n            # NVFP4_AWQ uses the same QuantMode as NVFP4, distinction is at QuantAlgo level\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)\n        else:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        if kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.INT8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_int8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp4_kv_cache()\n\n        return quant_mode\n\n    def to_dict(self):\n        return {\n            'use_smooth_quant':\n            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),\n            'per_channel':\n            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),\n            'per_token':\n            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),\n            'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n            'enable_fp8_rowwise':\n            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),\n            'enable_fp8_block_scales':\n            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),\n            'enable_nvfp4':\n            self.has_nvfp4(),\n            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),\n            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':\n            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),\n            'fp8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),\n            'use_weight_only':\n            self.is_weight_only(),\n            'weight_only_precision':\n            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',\n        }\n\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo:\n    BIAS = 1\n    ZERO = 2\n    PRE_QUANT_SCALE = 4\n    W4A8_ALPHA = 8\n    INT8_WEIGHT = 16\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "     W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()",
        "     # W4A8 MXFP4",
        "     W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()",
        "+    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()",
        "     W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()",
        "     W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()",

  "old_string": "    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):",

  "newString": "    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):",
  "oldString": "    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):",
  "originalFile": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2022-2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\nfrom enum import IntFlag, auto\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom strenum import StrEnum\n\nfrom .._utils import BaseEnumMeta\n\n\nclass QuantAlgo(StrEnum, metaclass=BaseEnumMeta):\n    W8A16 = auto()\n    W4A16 = auto()\n    W4A16_AWQ = auto()\n    W4A8_AWQ = auto()\n    W8A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W4A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    FP8 = auto()\n    FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    FP8_BLOCK_SCALES = auto()\n    INT8 = auto()\n    MIXED_PRECISION = auto()\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()\n    NO_QUANT = auto()\n\n\nQUANT_ALGO_LIST = list(set(QuantAlgo) - {QuantAlgo.INT8})\nKV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST = [QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.INT8, QuantAlgo.NVFP4]\nW8A8_SQ_PLUGIN_LIST = [\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n]\nMODELOPT_FLOW_QUANTIZATIONS = {\n    QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ, QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL,\n    QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ\n}\n\n\nclass QuantMode(IntFlag):\n    # [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH cpp/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h\n\n    # The weights are quantized to 4 bits.\n    INT4_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The weights are quantized to 8 bits.\n    INT8_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The activations are quantized.\n    ACTIVATIONS = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per channel. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=True,\n                                          use_w4a8_qserve=True)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False, per_group=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=False,\n                                          per_token=False,\n                                          per_channel=False,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=use_int4_weights)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_quant_algo(\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n        kv_cache_quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n    ) -> \"QuantMode\":\n        assert quant_algo is None or quant_algo in QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        assert kv_cache_quant_algo is None or kv_cache_quant_algo in KV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_qdq=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_rowwise=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_block_scales=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4_AWQ:\n            # NVFP4_AWQ uses the same QuantMode as NVFP4, distinction is at QuantAlgo level\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)\n        else:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        if kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.INT8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_int8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp4_kv_cache()\n\n        return quant_mode\n\n    def to_dict(self):\n        return {\n            'use_smooth_quant':\n            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),\n            'per_channel':\n            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),\n            'per_token':\n            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),\n            'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n            'enable_fp8_rowwise':\n            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),\n            'enable_fp8_block_scales':\n            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),\n            'enable_nvfp4':\n            self.has_nvfp4(),\n            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),\n            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':\n            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),\n            'fp8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),\n            'use_weight_only':\n            self.is_weight_only(),\n            'weight_only_precision':\n            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',\n        }\n\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo:\n    BIAS = 1\n    ZERO = 2\n    PRE_QUANT_SCALE = 4\n    W4A8_ALPHA = 8\n    INT8_WEIGHT = 16\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

  "oldString": "    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)",
  "originalFile": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2022-2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\nfrom enum import IntFlag, auto\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom strenum import StrEnum\n\nfrom .._utils import BaseEnumMeta\n\n\nclass QuantAlgo(StrEnum, metaclass=BaseEnumMeta):\n    W8A16 = auto()\n    W4A16 = auto()\n    W4A16_AWQ = auto()\n    W4A8_AWQ = auto()\n    W8A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W4A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    FP8 = auto()\n    FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    FP8_BLOCK_SCALES = auto()\n    INT8 = auto()\n    MIXED_PRECISION = auto()\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()\n    NO_QUANT = auto()\n\n\nQUANT_ALGO_LIST = list(set(QuantAlgo) - {QuantAlgo.INT8})\nKV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST = [QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.INT8, QuantAlgo.NVFP4]\nW8A8_SQ_PLUGIN_LIST = [\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n]\nMODELOPT_FLOW_QUANTIZATIONS = {\n    QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ, QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL,\n    QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ\n}\n\n\nclass QuantMode(IntFlag):\n    # [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH cpp/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h\n\n    # The weights are quantized to 4 bits.\n    INT4_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The weights are quantized to 8 bits.\n    INT8_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The activations are quantized.\n    ACTIVATIONS = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per channel. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=True,\n                                          use_w4a8_qserve=True)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False, per_group=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=False,\n                                          per_token=False,\n                                          per_channel=False,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=use_int4_weights)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_quant_algo(\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n        kv_cache_quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n    ) -> \"QuantMode\":\n        assert quant_algo is None or quant_algo in QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        assert kv_cache_quant_algo is None or kv_cache_quant_algo in KV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_qdq=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_rowwise=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_block_scales=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4_AWQ:\n            # NVFP4_AWQ uses the same QuantMode as NVFP4, distinction is at QuantAlgo level\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)\n        else:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        if kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.INT8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_int8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp4_kv_cache()\n\n        return quant_mode\n\n    def to_dict(self):\n        return {\n            'use_smooth_quant':\n            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),\n            'per_channel':\n            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),\n            'per_token':\n            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),\n            'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n            'enable_fp8_rowwise':\n            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),\n            'enable_fp8_block_scales':\n            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),\n            'enable_nvfp4':\n            self.has_nvfp4(),\n            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),\n            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':\n            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),\n            'fp8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),\n            'use_weight_only':\n            self.is_weight_only(),\n            'weight_only_precision':\n            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',\n        }\n\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo:\n    BIAS = 1\n    ZERO = 2\n    PRE_QUANT_SCALE = 4\n    W4A8_ALPHA = 8\n    INT8_WEIGHT = 16\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "         return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)",

        "-        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8",
        "+        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8",
        "                          | self.W4A16_MXFP4)",

        "     def has_weight_quant(self):"

  "oldString": "    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)",
  "originalFile": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2022-2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\nfrom enum import IntFlag, auto\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom strenum import StrEnum\n\nfrom .._utils import BaseEnumMeta\n\n\nclass QuantAlgo(StrEnum, metaclass=BaseEnumMeta):\n    W8A16 = auto()\n    W4A16 = auto()\n    W4A16_AWQ = auto()\n    W4A8_AWQ = auto()\n    W8A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W4A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    FP8 = auto()\n    FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    FP8_BLOCK_SCALES = auto()\n    INT8 = auto()\n    MIXED_PRECISION = auto()\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()\n    NO_QUANT = auto()\n\n\nQUANT_ALGO_LIST = list(set(QuantAlgo) - {QuantAlgo.INT8})\nKV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST = [QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.INT8, QuantAlgo.NVFP4]\nW8A8_SQ_PLUGIN_LIST = [\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n]\nMODELOPT_FLOW_QUANTIZATIONS = {\n    QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ, QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL,\n    QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ\n}\n\n\nclass QuantMode(IntFlag):\n    # [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH cpp/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h\n\n    # The weights are quantized to 4 bits.\n    INT4_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The weights are quantized to 8 bits.\n    INT8_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The activations are quantized.\n    ACTIVATIONS = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per channel. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=True,\n                                          use_w4a8_qserve=True)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False, per_group=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=False,\n                                          per_token=False,\n                                          per_channel=False,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=use_int4_weights)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_quant_algo(\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n        kv_cache_quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n    ) -> \"QuantMode\":\n        assert quant_algo is None or quant_algo in QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        assert kv_cache_quant_algo is None or kv_cache_quant_algo in KV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_qdq=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_rowwise=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_block_scales=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4_AWQ:\n            # NVFP4_AWQ uses the same QuantMode as NVFP4, distinction is at QuantAlgo level\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)\n        else:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        if kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.INT8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_int8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp4_kv_cache()\n\n        return quant_mode\n\n    def to_dict(self):\n        return {\n            'use_smooth_quant':\n            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),\n            'per_channel':\n            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),\n            'per_token':\n            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),\n            'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n            'enable_fp8_rowwise':\n            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),\n            'enable_fp8_block_scales':\n            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),\n            'enable_nvfp4':\n            self.has_nvfp4(),\n            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),\n            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':\n            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),\n            'fp8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),\n            'use_weight_only':\n            self.is_weight_only(),\n            'weight_only_precision':\n            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',\n        }\n\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo:\n    BIAS = 1\n    ZERO = 2\n    PRE_QUANT_SCALE = 4\n    W4A8_ALPHA = 8\n    INT8_WEIGHT = 16\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "                               | self.NVFP4",
        "                               | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8",
        "                               | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8",
        "+                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8",
        "                               | self.W4A16_MXFP4",
        "                               | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)",
        "         if exclude_kv_cache:"
      ],
      "newLines": 7,
      "newStart": 217,
      "oldLines": 6,
      "oldStart": 217

  ],
  "userModified": false
}
