Load bias if enabled\n            if self.bias:\n                gate_up_proj_weights[0][\"bias\"] = weights[f\"{expert}.w1.bias\"]\n                gate_up_proj_weights[1][\"bias\"] = weights[f\"{expert}.w3.bias\"]\n                down_proj_weights[0][\"bias\"] = weights[f\"{expert}.w2.bias\"]\n\n            self.experts[expert].gate_up_proj.load_weights(gate_up_proj_weights)\n            self.experts[expert].down_proj.load_weights(down_proj_weights)\n\n    def check_accuracy(self, output, ref_output):\n        check_accuracy(output, ref_output, rtol=0.10, atol=0.1, percent=0.85)\n\n\nclass WFP4A16QuantizeUtil(BaseQuantizeUtil):\n    \"\"\"\n    WFP4A16QuantizeUtil inherits from BaseQuantizeUtil to support correctness testing\n    for W4A16_MXFP4 quantized MoE modules.\n    Supports gptoss_style with custom swiglu parameters (inherited from BaseQuantizeUtil).\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def create_weights(self, **quant_kwargs) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create quantized weights for MoE experts using W4A16_MXFP4 quantization.\n        \"\"\"\n        assert (\n            self.quant_config is not None and self.quant_config.quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4\n        ), \"expect quant_algo to be W4A16_MXFP4\"\n\n        scaling_group_size = quant_kwargs.get(\"scaling_group_size\", 32)\n\n        weights = {}\n        for expert_id in range(self.num_experts):\n            # MXFP4 weights are stored as uint8 with half the input dimension\n            w1_weight = torch.randint(\n                0,\n                256,\n                (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size // 2),\n                dtype=torch.uint8,\n                device=\"cuda\",\n            )\n            w2_weight = torch.randint(\n                0,\n                256,\n                (self.hidden_size, self.intermediate_size // 2),\n                dtype=torch.uint8,\n                device=\"cuda\",\n            )\n            w3_weight = torch.randint(\n                0,\n                256,\n                (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size // 2),\n                dtype=torch.uint8,\n                device=\"cuda\",\n            )\n\n            # Scale tensors\n            w1_scale = torch.randint(\n                118,\n                123,\n                (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size // scaling_group_size),\n                dtype=torch.uint8,\n                device=\"cuda\",\n            )\n            w2_scale = torch.randint(\n                118,\n                123,\n                (self.hidden_size, self.intermediate_size // scaling_group_size),\n                dtype=torch.uint8,\n                device=\"cuda\",\n            )\n            w3_scale = torch.randint(\n                118,\n                123,\n                (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size // scaling_group_size),\n                dtype=torch.uint8,\n                device=\"cuda\",\n            )\n\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"] = w1_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"] = w2_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"] = w3_weight\n            # MXFP4WeightFusedMoEMethod\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale\"] = w1_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale\"] = w2_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale\"] = w3_scale\n            # WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale_inv\"] = w1_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale_inv\"] = w2_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale_inv\"] = w3_scale\n\n            # Bias for gptoss_style\n            if self.bias:\n                weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.bias\"] = torch.randn(\n                    self.intermediate_size, device=\"cuda\", dtype=torch.float\n                )\n                weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.bias\"] = torch.randn(\n                    self.hidden_size, device=\"cuda\", dtype=torch.float\n                )\n                weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.bias\"] = torch.randn(\n                    self.intermediate_size, device=\"cuda\", dtype=torch.float\n                )\n        return weights\n\n    def create_ref_module(\n        self, routing_method, ref_cls=WFP4A16RefGatedMLPFusedMoE\n    ) -> torch.nn.Module:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a reference module for correctness testing with gptoss_style support.\n        \"\"\"\n        return super().create_ref_module(routing_method, ref_cls)\n\n\nclass W8A16RefGatedMLPFusedMoE(RefGatedMLPFusedMoE):\n    \"\"\"\n    A derived class of RefGatedMLPFusedMoE serves as a reference implementation of W8A16\n    quantization for correctness testing.\n\n    Since GatedMLP doesn't support W8A16 quantization, we dequantize the weights\n    in load_weights and use non-quantized forward.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        num_experts: int,\n        routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        model_config: Optional[ModelConfig] = None,\n        bias=False,\n        swiglu_alpha: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_beta: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_limit: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    ):\n        # Store the original quant_config for assertion in load_weights\n        self._original_quant_config = model_config.quant_config if model_config else None\n        # Create experts without quantization config since we'll dequantize weights\n        super().__init__(\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            model_config=ModelConfig(),  # No quant_config\n            bias=bias,\n            swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n        )\n\n    def load_weights(self, weights_list: List[Dict]):\n        assert len(weights_list) == 1\n        weights = weights_list[0]\n\n        assert (\n            self._original_quant_config\n            and self._original_quant_config.quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16\n        ), \"expect quant_algo to be W8A16\"\n\n        for expert in range(self.num_experts):\n            # Get quantized weights and scales\n            w1 = weights[f\"{expert}.w1.weight\"]\n            s1 = weights[f\"{expert}.w1.weight_scale\"]\n            w3 = weights[f\"{expert}.w3.weight\"]\n            s3 = weights[f\"{expert}.w3.weight_scale\"]\n            w2 = weights[f\"{expert}.w2.weight\"]\n            s2 = weights[f\"{expert}.w2.weight_scale\"]\n\n            # Dequantize weights: w_dequant = (w.float() * scale).to(dtype)\n            # Note: weights are (out_features, in_features), need transpose for matmul\n            w1_dequant = (w1.T.contiguous().float() * s1).to(self.dtype).T.contiguous()\n            w3_dequant = (w3.T.contiguous().float() * s3).to(self.dtype).T.contiguous()\n            w2_dequant = (w2.T.contiguous().float() * s2).to(self.dtype).T.contiguous()\n\n            # Load as regular weights (no scales)\n            gate_up_proj_weights = [{}, {}]\n            down_proj_weights = [{}]\n            gate_up_proj_weights[0][\"weight\"] = w1_dequant\n            gate_up_proj_weights[1][\"weight\"] = w3_dequant\n            down_proj_weights[0][\"weight\"] = w2_dequant\n            self.experts[expert].gate_up_proj.load_weights(gate_up_proj_weights)\n            self.experts[expert].down_proj.load_weights(down_proj_weights)\n\n    def check_accuracy(self, output, ref_output, weight_dtype=torch.int8):\n        # Align with woq_assert_near_eq function\n        atol = calc_woq_tolerence(ref_output, weight_dtype)\n        torch.testing.assert_close(output, ref_output, rtol=1e-7, atol=atol)\n\n\n# int8_woq_per_channel\nclass W8A16QuantizeUtil(BaseQuantizeUtil):\n    \"\"\"\n    W8A16QuantizeUtil inherits from BaseQuantizeUtil to support correctness testing\n    for W8A16 quantized MoE modules (INT8 weight-only quantization).\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def create_weights(self, **quant_kwargs) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create quantized weights for MoE experts using W8A16 quantization.\n        \"\"\"\n        assert self.quant_config is not None and self.quant_config.quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16, (\n            \"expect quant_algo to be W8A16\"\n        )\n        weights = {}\n        for expert_id in range(self.num_experts):\n            w1_weight = torch.randint(\n                -128, 127, (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size), dtype=torch.int8\n            ).cuda()\n            w2_weight = torch.randint(\n                -128, 127, (self.hidden_size, self.intermediate_size), dtype=torch.int8\n            ).cuda()\n            w3_weight = torch.randint(\n                -128, 127, (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size), dtype=torch.int8\n            ).cuda()\n\n            # Per-channel scales\n            w1_scale = (\n                torch.randn(self.intermediate_size, dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\")\n                / self.hidden_size\n            )\n            w2_scale = (\n                torch.randn(self.hidden_size, dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\")\n                / self.intermediate_size\n            )\n            w3_scale = (\n                torch.randn(self.intermediate_size, dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\")\n                / self.hidden_size\n            )\n\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"] = w1_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"] = w2_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"] = w3_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale\"] = w1_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale\"] = w2_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale\"] = w3_scale\n        return weights\n\n    def create_ref_module(\n        self, routing_method, ref_cls=W8A16RefGatedMLPFusedMoE\n    ) -> torch.nn.Module:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a reference module for correctness testing.\n        \"\"\"\n        return super().create_ref_module(routing_method, ref_cls)\n\n\nclass W4A8AWQRefGatedMLPFusedMoE(nn.Module):\n    \"\"\"\n    A reference implementation of W4A8_AWQ quantization for MoE correctness testing.\n\n    IMPORTANT: This class does NOT inherit from RefGatedMLPFusedMoE because W4A8_AWQ\n    cannot be correctly reproduced by simply dequantizing weights and using non-quantized\n    GatedMLP forward. The reasons are:\n\n    1. W4A8_AWQ involves a complete Q/DQ (Quantize/Dequantize) process for activations:\n       - Apply pre_quant_scale to activation (AWQ smoothing)\n       - Quantize activation to FP8 (clamp + cast)\n       - Dequantize back to original dtype\n       This Q/DQ process introduces quantization noise that affects the final result.\n\n    2. For fused gate_up_proj (w3_w1), the scales must use max() operation:\n       - input_scale: p3_p1 = torch.max(p1, p3)\n       - pre_quant_scale: a1_a3 = torch.max(a1, a3)\n       - weight_scale_2: q3_q1 = torch.max(q1, q3)\n       This ensures both w3 and w1 computations use consistent scales when fused.\n\n    3. The output needs to be scaled by input_scale and weight_scale_2 after matmul.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        num_experts: int,\n        routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        model_config: Optional[ModelConfig] = None,\n        bias=False,\n        weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode = MoEWeightLoadingMode.W4A8_CUSTOM,\n        scaling_group_size: int = 128,\n    ):\n        super().__init__()\n        self.num_experts = num_experts\n        self.routing_method = routing_method\n        self.hidden_size = hidden_size\n        self.intermediate_size = intermediate_size\n        self.dtype = dtype\n        self.bias = bias\n        self.weight_loading_mode = weight_loading_mode\n        self.scaling_group_size = scaling_group_size\n        # Store raw quantized weights for forward computation\n        self.weights = None\n\n    def _unpack_weights(self, weight: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:\n        \"\"\"Unpack INT4 packed weights to INT8.\"\"\"\n        unpacker = torch.ops.trtllm.unpack_int4_packed_tensor_to_int8\n        # ModelOpt W4A8 packs pairs of 4b weights in the output dimension into one 8b element.\n        if self.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n            return unpacker(weight.cpu().T.contiguous()).cuda()\n        # The custom W4A8 quantization script packs pairs of 4b weight in the input dimension.\n        else:\n            return unpacker(weight.cpu()).T.contiguous().cuda()\n\n    def load_weights(self, weights: List[Dict]):\n        \"\"\"Store raw quantized weights for forward computation.\"\"\"\n        assert len(weights) == 1\n        self.weights = weights[0]\n\n    def _process_layer(\n        self,\n        act: torch.Tensor,\n        weight: torch.Tensor,\n        weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n        input_scale: torch.Tensor,\n        pre_quant_scale: torch.Tensor = None,\n        weight_scale_2: torch.Tensor = None,\n    ) -> torch.Tensor:\n        \"\"\"\n        Process a single layer with W4A8_AWQ quantization.\n\n        This implements the complete Q/DQ process:\n        1. Apply pre_quant_scale to activation (AWQ smoothing)\n        2. Quantize activation to FP8 (simulate quantization noise)\n        3. Dequantize weight using weight_scale\n        4. Compute matmul and scale output\n        \"\"\"\n        # Step 1: Apply pre_quant_scale (AWQ smoothing) if present\n        if pre_quant_scale is not None:\n            act = act * pre_quant_scale\n\n        # Step 2: Quantize activation to FP8 and dequantize back (Q/DQ simulation)\n        # This introduces quantization noise that is part of the W4A8_AWQ computation\n        act = torch.clamp((act / input_scale), -448.0, 448.0).to(torch.float8_e4m3fn).to(self.dtype)\n\n        # Step 3: Dequantize weight\n        weight = (\n            weight.float() * weight_scale.repeat_interleave(self.scaling_group_size, dim=0).float()\n        ).to(self.dtype)\n        if weight_scale_2 is not None:\n            weight = weight / weight_scale_2\n\n        # Step 4: Compute matmul and scale output\n        output = torch.matmul(act, weight) * input_scale\n        if weight_scale_2 is not None:\n            output = output * weight_scale_2\n\n        return output\n\n    def forward(self, hidden_states: torch.Tensor, router_logits: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:\n        \"\"\"Forward pass implementing the complete W4A8_AWQ reference computation.\"\"\"\n        assert hidden_states.shape[-1] == self.hidden_size\n        hidden_states = hidden_states.view(-1, self.hidden_size)\n\n        results = torch.zeros_like(hidden_states)\n        selected_experts, final_scales = self.routing_method.apply(router_logits)\n\n        # Determine weight_scale key based on weight_loading_mode\n        if self.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n            weight_scale_key = \"weight_scale\"\n        else:\n            weight_scale_key = \"weight_scale_inv\"\n\n        for expert_id in range(self.num_experts):\n            mask = selected_experts == expert_id\n            activated_tokens = mask.sum(1).bool()\n            act = hidden_states[activated_tokens, :]\n            if act.shape[0] == 0:\n                continue\n            final_scale = (final_scales * mask).sum(1)[activated_tokens].unsqueeze(1)\n\n            # Unpack INT4 weights to INT8\n            w1 = self._unpack_weights(self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"])\n            w2 = self._unpack_weights(self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"])\n            w3 = self._unpack_weights(self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"])\n            # Fuse w3 and w1 for gate_up_proj\n            w3_w1 = torch.cat([w3, w1], dim=-1)\n\n            # Get weight scales and transpose for matmul\n            s1 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.{weight_scale_key}\"].T.contiguous().cuda()\n            s2 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.{weight_scale_key}\"].T.contiguous().cuda()\n            s3 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.{weight_scale_key}\"].T.contiguous().cuda()\n            # Fuse scales - must cat in same order as weights\n            s3_s1 = torch.cat([s3, s1], dim=-1)\n\n            # Get input scales\n            p1 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.input_scale\"].cuda()\n            p2 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.input_scale\"].cuda()\n            p3 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.input_scale\"].cuda()\n            # IMPORTANT: Use max for fused computation to ensure consistent quantization\n            p3_p1 = torch.max(p1, p3)\n\n            # Get pre_quant_scale (only for VANILLA mode)\n            a1 = a2 = a3 = a1_a3 = None\n            if self.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n                a1 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.pre_quant_scale\"].T.contiguous().cuda()\n                a2 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.pre_quant_scale\"].T.contiguous().cuda()\n                a3 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.pre_quant_scale\"].T.contiguous().cuda()\n                # IMPORTANT: Use max for fused computation\n                a1_a3 = torch.max(a1, a3)\n\n            # Get weight_scale_2 (only for VANILLA mode)\n            q1 = q2 = q3 = q3_q1 = None\n            if self.weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n                q1 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale_2\"].cuda()\n                q2 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale_2\"].cuda()\n                q3 = self.weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale_2\"].cuda()\n                # IMPORTANT: Use max for fused computation\n                q3_q1 = torch.max(q3, q1)\n\n            # Forward pass: gate_up_proj (fc13)\n            fc1 = self._process_layer(\n                act,\n                w3_w1,\n                s3_s1,\n                p3_p1,\n                pre_quant_scale=a1_a3,\n                weight_scale_2=q3_q1,\n            )\n            # SwiGLU activation: first half is up (w3), second half is gate (w1)\n            fc1, gate = fc1.chunk(2, dim=-1)\n            fc1 = fc1 * F.silu(gate)\n\n            # Forward pass: down_proj (fc2)\n            fc2 = self._process_layer(\n                fc1,\n                w2,\n                s2,\n                p2,\n                pre_quant_scale=a2,\n                weight_scale_2=q2,\n            )\n\n            results[activated_tokens, :] += (fc2 * final_scale).to(results.dtype)\n\n        return results.reshape(hidden_states.shape)\n\n    def check_accuracy(self, output, ref_output):\n        torch.testing.assert_close(output, ref_output, rtol=1e-2, atol=0.1)\n\n\nclass W4A8AWQQuantizeUtil(BaseQuantizeUtil):\n    \"\"\"\n    W4A8AWQQuantizeUtil inherits from BaseQuantizeUtil to support correctness testing\n    for W4A8_AWQ quantized MoE modules.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        num_experts: int,\n        dtype: torch.dtype,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        quant_config: QuantConfig,\n    ):\n        super().__init__(num_experts, dtype, intermediate_size, hidden_size, quant_config)\n        # These will be set in create_weights and used in create_ref_module\n        self.weight_loading_mode = MoEWeightLoadingMode.W4A8_CUSTOM\n        self.scaling_group_size = 128\n\n    def create_weights(self, **quant_kwargs) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create quantized weights for MoE experts using W4A8_AWQ quantization.\n        \"\"\"\n        assert (\n            self.quant_config is not None and self.quant_config.quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ\n        ), \"expect quant_algo to be W4A8_AWQ\"\n\n        self.scaling_group_size = quant_kwargs.get(\"scaling_group_size\", 128)\n        self.weight_loading_mode = quant_kwargs.get(\n            \"weight_loading_mode\", MoEWeightLoadingMode.W4A8_CUSTOM\n        )\n        scaling_group_size = self.scaling_group_size\n        weight_loading_mode = self.weight_loading_mode\n        affine_coeff = 0.005\n\n        # Determine weight shapes based on weight_loading_mode\n        # ModelOpt W4A8 packs pairs of 4b weights in the output dimension into one 8b element.\n        if weight_loading_mode == MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA:\n            w1_shape = (self.intermediate_size // 2, self.hidden_size)\n            w2_shape = (self.hidden_size // 2, self.intermediate_size)\n            w3_shape = (self.intermediate_size // 2, self.hidden_size)\n            weight_scale_key = \"weight_scale\"\n        # The custom W4A8 quantization script packs pairs of 4b weight in the input dimension.\n        else:  # W4A8_CUSTOM\n            w1_shape = (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size // 2)\n            w2_shape = (self.hidden_size, self.intermediate_size // 2)\n            w3_shape = (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size // 2)\n            weight_scale_key = \"weight_scale_inv\"\n\n        weights = {}\n        for expert_id in range(self.num_experts):\n            # INT4 weights packed based on weight_loading_mode\n            w1_weight = torch.randint(-128, 127, w1_shape, dtype=torch.int8).cuda()\n            w2_weight = torch.randint(-128, 127, w2_shape, dtype=torch.int8).cuda()\n            w3_weight = torch.randint(-128, 127, w3_shape, dtype=torch.int8).cuda()\n\n            # Pre-quant scale\n            w1_pre_quant_scale = (\n                torch.rand(self.hidden_size, dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\") * 0.1 + 0.95\n            )\n            w2_pre_quant_scale = (\n                torch.rand(self.intermediate_size, dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\") * 0.1 + 0.95\n            )\n            w3_pre_quant_scale = (\n                torch.rand(self.hidden_size, dtype=self.dtype, device=\"cuda\") * 0.1 + 0.95\n            )\n\n            # Weight scale\n            w1_scale = (\n                torch.randn(\n                    (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size // scaling_group_size),\n                    dtype=self.dtype,\n                    device=\"cuda\",\n                )\n                * affine_coeff\n            )\n            w2_scale = (\n                torch.randn(\n                    (self.hidden_size, self.intermediate_size // scaling_group_size),\n                    dtype=self.dtype,\n                    device=\"cuda\",\n                )\n                * affine_coeff\n            )\n            w3_scale = (\n                torch.randn(\n                    (self.intermediate_size, self.hidden_size // scaling_group_size),\n                    dtype=self.dtype,\n                    device=\"cuda\",\n                )\n                * affine_coeff\n            )\n\n            # Input scale\n            w1_input_scale = torch.randn(1, dtype=torch.float32, device=\"cuda\") * 0.2\n            w2_input_scale = w1_input_scale\n            w3_input_scale = w1_input_scale\n\n            # Weight scale 2\n            w1_weight_scale_2 = torch.ones([1], dtype=torch.float32, device=\"cuda\")\n            w2_weight_scale_2 = w1_weight_scale_2\n            w3_weight_scale_2 = w1_weight_scale_2\n\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight\"] = w1_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight\"] = w2_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight\"] = w3_weight\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.{weight_scale_key}\"] = w1_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.{weight_scale_key}\"] = w2_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.{weight_scale_key}\"] = w3_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.input_scale\"] = w1_input_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.input_scale\"] = w2_input_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.input_scale\"] = w3_input_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.pre_quant_scale\"] = w1_pre_quant_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.pre_quant_scale\"] = w2_pre_quant_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.pre_quant_scale\"] = w3_pre_quant_scale\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w1.weight_scale_2\"] = w1_weight_scale_2\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w2.weight_scale_2\"] = w2_weight_scale_2\n            weights[f\"{expert_id}.w3.weight_scale_2\"] = w3_weight_scale_2\n        return weights\n\n    def create_ref_module(\n        self, routing_method, ref_cls=W4A8AWQRefGatedMLPFusedMoE\n    ) -> torch.nn.Module:\n        \"\"\"\n        Create a reference module for correctness testing.\n        \"\"\"\n        ref_fused_moe = ref_cls(\n            num_experts=self.num_experts,\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            hidden_size=self.hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=self.intermediate_size,\n            dtype=self.dtype,\n            model_config=ModelConfig(quant_config=self.quant_config),\n            weight_loading_mode=self.weight_loading_mode,\n            scaling_group_size=self.scaling_group_size,\n        )\n        return ref_fused_moe\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "         check_accuracy(output, ref_output, rtol=0.10, atol=0.1, percent=0.85)",
        " ",
        " ",
        "+class MXFP4FP8QuantizeUtil(MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil):",
        "+    \"\"\"",
        "+    MXFP4FP8QuantizeUtil inherits from MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil to support correctness testing",
        "+    for W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 quantized MoE modules.",
        "+",
        "+    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 uses FP8 activations instead of MXFP8, but shares the same",
        "+    weight quantization scheme with MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil.",
        "+    \"\"\"",
        "+    pass",
        "+",
        "+",
        "+class MXFP4INT8QuantizeUtil(MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil):",
        "+    \"\"\"",
        "+    MXFP4INT8QuantizeUtil inherits from MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil to support correctness testing",
        "+    for W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 quantized MoE modules.",
        "+",
        "+    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 uses INT8 activations instead of MXFP8, but shares the same",
        "+    weight quantization scheme with MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil.",
        "+    \"\"\"",
        "+    pass",
        "+",

    "content": "    to_userbuffers: bool = False,\n) -> torch.Tensor:\n\n    tuner = AutoTuner.get()\n\n    # allocate workspace for profiling\n    w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm_runner = FP4GemmRunner(\n        fp4_utils.FP4GemmType.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8, to_userbuffers, output_dtype)\n\n    _, best_tactic = tuner.choose_one(\n        \"trtllm::w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm::gemm\",\n        [w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm_runner],\n        FP4GemmRunner.tuning_config,\n        [act_fp8, weight, act_sf, weight_scale, alpha],\n    )\n\n    return w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm_runner(\n        inputs=[act_fp8, weight, act_sf, weight_scale, alpha],\n        tactic=best_tactic)\n\n\n@w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm.register_fake\ndef _(\n    act_fp4: torch.Tensor,\n    weight: torch.Tensor,\n    act_sf: torch.Tensor,\n    weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n    alpha: torch.Tensor,\n    output_dtype: torch.dtype,\n    to_userbuffers: bool = False,",
    "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/custom_ops/torch_custom_ops.py",

const& other) noexcept = default;\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode none() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(0));\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int4Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 0);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 1);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode activations() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 2);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perChannelScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perTokenScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 4);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 8);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8RowWise() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3 | BaseType(1u) << 4 | BaseType(1u) << 9);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8BlockScales() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 10);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8QServe() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 13);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasActivations() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(activations());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerChannelScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perChannelScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerTokenScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perTokenScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerGroupScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp4KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp4KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8Qdq() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8Qdq());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Int8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Int8, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantizeWeights)\n        {\n            if (useInt4Weights)\n                quantMode += int4Weights();\n            else\n                quantMode += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8RowWise();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8BlockScales)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8BlockScales();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8QServe)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Int8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Int8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        " ",
        "     static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept",
        "     {",
        "-        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);",

        "     }",
        " ",
        "     static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept",

        "     static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept",

        "+        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);",
        "     }",
        " ",
        "     static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept",

        "+        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 18);",
        "     }",

87. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "python3 -c \"\nimport sys\nsys.path.insert(0, '/workspace')\n\n# Count the auto() values in order\nvalues = [\n    ('INT4_WEIGHTS', 0),\n    ('INT8_WEIGHTS', 1),\n    ('ACTIVATIONS', 2),\n    ('PER_CHANNEL', 3),\n    ('PER_TOKEN', 4),\n    ('PER_GROUP', 5),\n    ('INT8_KV_CACHE', 6),\n    ('FP8_KV_CACHE', 7),\n    ('FP8_QDQ', 8),\n    # FP8_ROWWISE is special\n    ('FP8_1x128_128x128', 10),\n    ('W4A8_QSERVE', 11),\n    ('NVFP4', 12),\n    ('NVFP4_KV_CACHE', 13),\n    ('W4A8_NVFP4_FP8', 14),\n    ('W4A8_MXFP4_FP8', 15),\n    ('W4A8_MXFP4_INT8', 16),\n    ('W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8', 17),\n    ('W4A16_MXFP4', 18),\n]\n\nfor name, bit_shift in values:\n    print(f'{name} = 1u << {bit_shift} = {1 << bit_shift}')\n\" 2>&1",
  "description": "Verify bit shift values for C++ QuantMode"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "INT4_WEIGHTS = 1u << 0 = 1\nINT8_WEIGHTS = 1u << 1 = 2\nACTIVATIONS = 1u << 2 = 4\nPER_CHANNEL = 1u << 3 = 8\nPER_TOKEN = 1u << 4 = 16\nPER_GROUP = 1u << 5 = 32\nINT8_KV_CACHE = 1u << 6 = 64\nFP8_KV_CACHE = 1u << 7 = 128\nFP8_QDQ = 1u << 8 = 256\nFP8_1x128_128x128 = 1u << 10 = 1024\nW4A8_QSERVE = 1u << 11 = 2048\nNVFP4 = 1u << 12 = 4096\nNVFP4_KV_CACHE = 1u << 13 = 8192\nW4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = 1u << 14 = 16384\nW4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = 1u << 15 = 32768\nW4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = 1u << 16 = 65536\nW4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = 1u << 17 = 131072\nW4A16_MXFP4 = 1u << 18 = 262144"
}

        {
            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,
                false, false, false, false, true, false);
        }

Before
    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)
    {
        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,

After
    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)
    {
        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,
            false, false, false, false);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)
    {
        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,
            false, false, false, false, false, false);

    def setup_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module):
        module.quant_scales = FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4FP8(
            fc31_weight_block_scale=module.w3_w1_weight_scale,

class MXFP4WeightTRTLLMGenFusedMoEMethod(MXFP4WeightFusedMoEMethod):
After
    def setup_quant_scales(self, module: torch.nn.Module):
        module.quant_scales = FusedMoEQuantScalesW4A8MXFP4FP8(
            fc31_weight_block_scale=module.w3_w1_weight_scale,
            fc31_dequant_scale=module.fc31_input_dequant,
            fc2_input_scale=module.fc2_input_scale,
            fc2_weight_block_scale=module.w2_weight_scale,
            fc2_dequant_scale=module.fc2_input_dequant,
        )


class W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod(MXFP4WeightCutlassFusedMoEMethod):

    def create_weights(self, module: torch.nn.Module):
        fc31_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(
            module.expert_size_per_partition, dtype=torch.float32),
                                          requires_grad=False)
        module.register_parameter("fc31_input_dequant", fc31_input_dequant)

        fc2_input_dequant = nn.Parameter(torch.empty(
            module.expert_size_per_partition, dtype=torch.float32),
                                         requires_grad=False)
        module.register_parameter("fc2_input_dequant", fc2_input_dequant)

        super().create_weights(module)

        self._online_eplb_not_supported(module)

        self.setup_quant_scales(module)

    def load_expert_fc31_input_scale_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(
            self, w1_input_scale, w3_input_scale,
            dst_fc31_input_dequant: torch.Tensor):
        w1_input_scale = w1_input_scale[...].reshape([])
        assert torch.allclose(
            w1_input_scale, w3_input_scale), "w1_input_scale != w3_input_scale"
        dst_fc31_input_dequant.copy_(w1_input_scale)

    def load_expert_fc2_input_scale_w4a8_mxfp4_int8(
            self, w2_input_scale, dst_fc2_input_dequant: torch.Tensor):
        dst_fc2_input_dequant.copy_(w2_input_scale[...].reshape([]))

... (truncated)

22. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py
Before
        """
        Check if CutlassFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.

        CutlassFusedMoE supports:
        - Unquantized (FP16/BF16): SM >= 80
        - FP8 per-tensor (QDQ): SM >= 89
        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES: SM == 90 only
        - NVFP4: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_AWQ: SM in {89, 90} only
        - W8A16: SM >= 80
        - W4A16_MXFP4: SM == 90 only
        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: SM in {100, 103}
After
        """
        Check if CutlassFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.

        CutlassFusedMoE supports:
        - Unquantized (FP16/BF16): SM >= 80
        - FP8 per-tensor (QDQ): SM >= 89
        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES: SM == 90 only
        - NVFP4: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_AWQ: SM in {89, 90} only
        - W8A16: SM >= 80
        - W4A16_MXFP4: SM == 90 only
        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_MXFP4_INT8: SM in {100, 103}
        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: SM in {100, 103}
23. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py
Before
        Args:
            quant_algo: The quantization algorithm to check (None for unquantized)
            dtype_activation: The activation input data type (before quantization).
                Supported dtypes vary by quantization mode:
                - Unquantized: float16, bfloat16
                - FP8/FP8_BLOCK_SCALES/W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: float16, bfloat16, float32
                - NVFP4: float16, bfloat16, float8_e4m3fn
                - W4A16_MXFP4/W4A8_AWQ/W8A16/W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: float16, bfloat16
            gptoss_style: Whether gptoss_style (bias/swiglu with custom alpha/beta/limit) is enabled.
                CutlassFusedMoE only supports gptoss_style for W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 quantization.
After
        Args:
            quant_algo: The quantization algorithm to check (None for unquantized)
            dtype_activation: The activation input data type (before quantization).
                Supported dtypes vary by quantization mode:
                - Unquantized: float16, bfloat16
                - FP8/FP8_BLOCK_SCALES/W4A8_MXFP4_FP8/W4A8_MXFP4_INT8: float16, bfloat16, float32
                - NVFP4: float16, bfloat16, float8_e4m3fn
                - W4A16_MXFP4/W4A8_AWQ/W8A16/W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: float16, bfloat16
            gptoss_style: Whether gptoss_style (bias/swiglu with custom alpha/beta/limit) is enabled.
                CutlassFusedMoE only supports gptoss_style for W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 quantization.
24. EDIT /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py
Before
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():
                return W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():
                return WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():
                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()
After
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8():
                return W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8():
                return W4A8MXFP4INT8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4():
                return WFP4A16FusedMoEMethod()
            elif self.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8():
                return W4A8MXFP4MXFP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod()

        """
        Check if TritonFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.

        TritonFusedMoE supports (SM90 only, gptoss_style=True only):

        """
        Check if TritonFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.

        TritonFusedMoE supports (SM90 only, gptoss_style=True only):
        - Unquantized (BF16 only)
        - FP8 per-tensor (QDQ)
        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8

32. EDIT /workspace/tests/unittest/_torch/modules/moe/quantize_utils.py
Before
    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:
        quantize_util_cls = MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil
        quant_config = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)
        # Different backends have different alignment requirements:
        # - CUTLASS: weight_alignment=128, input_hidden_alignment=128
        # - TRTLLM: weight_alignment=128, input_hidden_alignment=512
        backend_name = _normalize_backend_name(backend_type)
        if backend_name is not None:
            if backend_name == "TRTLLM":
                quant_kwargs["weight_alignment"] = 128
                quant_kwargs["input_hidden_alignment"] = 512
            elif backend_name == "CUTLASS":
                # CUTLASS and others use weight_alignment for both
                quant_kwargs["weight_alignment"] = 128
                quant_kwargs["input_hidden_alignment"] = 128
    elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:

33. EDIT /workspace/tests/unittest/_torch/modules/moe/quantize_utils.py
Before
class WFP4A16QuantizeUtil(BaseQuantizeUtil):
After
class MXFP4FP8QuantizeUtil(MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil):
    """
    MXFP4FP8QuantizeUtil inherits from MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil to support correctness testing
    for W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 quantized MoE modules.

    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 uses FP8 activations instead of MXFP8, but shares the same
    weight quantization scheme with MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil.
    """
    pass


class MXFP4INT8QuantizeUtil(MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil):
    """
    MXFP4INT8QuantizeUtil inherits from MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil to support correctness testing
    for W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 quantized MoE modules.

    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 uses INT8 activations instead of MXFP8, but shares the same
    weight quantization scheme with MXFP4MXFP8QuantizeUtil.
    """
    pass


class WFP4A16QuantizeUtil(BaseQuantizeUtil):
34. EDIT /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h
Before
    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);
    }
After
    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);
    }

    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept
    {
        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 18);
    }

      

      

        Bash Commands (24)
        
1. $ find . -type f -name "*test*quantization*" | head -20
2. $ python -m pytest tests/unittest/trt/quantization/test_fp8_quantization.py -v 2>&1 | head -100
3. $ find . -type f -name "*.py" -path "*/tensorrt_llm/*" | xargs grep -l "kernel.*select\|select.*kernel" | head -10
4. $ grep -n "W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod\|class.*Mxfp4" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py | head -20
5. $ grep -n "W4A8MXFP4.*CutlassFusedMoEMethod\|QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py | head -20
6. $ grep -n "quant_algo.*W4A8_MXFP4\|W4A8_MXFP4.*quant_algo\|isinstance.*W4A8MXFP4" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py | head -20
7. $ grep -rn "W4A8MXFP4FP8CutlassFusedMoEMethod\|W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/ --include="*.py" | head -20
8. $ grep -rn "attention.*backend\|backend.*attention" /workspace/tensorrt_llm --include="*.py" | grep -i quant | head -10
9. $ find /workspace -path "*build*" -name "*quant*" -type f | head -10
10. $ grep -rn "W4A8_MXFP4" /workspace/cpp --include="*.cpp" --include="*.h" | head -20
11. $ grep -n "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace/cpp/tensorrt_llm/kernels/cutlass_kernels/include/fp4_gemm.h /workspace/cpp/tensorrt_llm/kernels/internal_cutlass_kernels/include/fp4_gemm.h
12. $ grep -rn "enum.*FP4GemmType\|FP4GemmType::" /workspace/cpp --include="*.h" | head -20
13. $ grep -rn "W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\|W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8" /workspace/tests --include="*.py" | head -15
14. $ grep -n "class.*MXFP4.*QuantizeUtil\|class.*FP8.*QuantizeUtil" /workspace/tests/unittest/_torch/modules/moe/quantize_utils.py | head -20
15. $ grep -n "^class" /workspace/tests/unittest/_torch/modules/moe/quantize_utils.py | tail -5
16. $ python -c "from tensorrt_llm.quantization.mode import QuantAlgo, QuantMode; print('QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8:', QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_INT8); qm = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_int8=True); print('QuantMode with INT8:', qm.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8())" 2>&1 | head -50
17. $ python -m py_compile /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py 2>&1
18. $ python -m py_compile /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/quantization.py /workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/model_config.py 2>&1
19. $ grep -rn "W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\|W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace/tensorrt_llm --include="*.py" | grep -v "test" | grep -v "__pycache__" | head -20
20. $ grep -rn "test.*W4A8\|W4A8.*test" /workspace/tests --include="*.py" | grep -i "mxfp4\|moe" | head -10
21. $ grep -rn "W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\|W4A8_MXFP4_FP8" /workspace/tests --include="*.py" | grep -E "test_|def " | head -20
22. $ grep -n "1u.*<<" /workspace/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h | grep -A2 -B2 "w4a8Mxfp4"
23. $ grep -n "auto()" /workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py | tail -10
24. $ python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/workspace')

# Count the auto() values in order
values = [
    ('INT4_WEIGHTS', 0),
    ('INT8_WEIGHTS', 1),
    ('ACTIVATIONS', 2),
    ('PER_CHANNEL', 3),
    ('PER_TOKEN', 4),
    ('PER_GROUP', 5),
    ('INT8_KV_CACHE', 6),
    ('FP8_KV_CACHE', 7),
    ('FP8_QDQ', 8),
    # FP8_ROWWISE is special
    ('FP8_1x128_128x128', 10),
    ('W4A8_QSERVE', 11),
    ('NVFP4', 12),
    ('NVFP4_KV_CACHE', 13),
    ('W4A8_NVFP4_FP8', 14),
    ('W4A8_MXFP4_FP8', 15),
    ('W4A8_MXFP4_INT8', 16),
    ('W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8', 17),
    ('W4A16_MXFP4', 18),
]

for name, bit_shift in values:
    print(f'{name} = 1u << {bit_shift} = {1 << bit_shift}')
" 2>&1
